description_long: This is a tall, slender aluminum can with a matte black exterior and a metallic silver top. The can features minimalist, modern typography in white and teal, with the main label text partially visible and cleanly spaced. The top of the can has a standard pull tab opening, typical of beverage cans. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or textural embellishments. The label design is simple, with sparse use of color and geometric alignment, giving it a contemporary, urban feel. The can is likely filled with beer, as indicated by its labeling and context.
description: A sleek, matte black aluminum beer can with minimalist white and teal typography and a silver pull tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label text in white and teal on a matte black background, with the silver pull tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view with only a partial letter and teal accent visible, emphasizing the can's cylindrical shape and minimal design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing a single stylized 'S' and teal line, with most of the label text out of sight.
description_view_3: Angled view revealing the start of the main label text and a portion of the word 'LABELS', with the rest of the can mostly black.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a minimalist design with bold, sans-serif typography in white and teal on a matte black background. The overall style is clean and modern, with sparse use of color and geometric alignment.
